home.title: Magix Promotion — Music Booking & Management
home.description: Band and music artist agency for events, concerts and private parties in Italy and worldwide.
home.whoWeAreBody: Magix Promotion International Agency operates in the live music field, organizing events, festivals and other initiatives. Collaborations with the most important Italian and international live clubs allows us to guarantee the production of music events, taking care of every aspect: artistic, technical, logistic and promotional with great professionalism, thanks to our passion for music.

scout.title: FIND YOUR
scout.subtitle: Describe the event, the mood or the genre you're looking for. Our assistant will find the perfect band for you.
scout.placeholder: e.g: "I'm looking for an energetic band for a wedding in Como..."
scout.inputAria: Describe the band you're looking for
scout.noMatch: No artist found. Try describing your event in more detail.
scout.suggestion6: Show band with dancers for outdoor event

privacy.title: PRIVACY
privacy.subtitle: Information on the processing of personal data pursuant to EU Regulation 2016/679 (GDPR).
privacy.dataCollectedIntro: This website collects the following personal data exclusively through the quote request form:
privacy.purposeText: Data is processed exclusively to respond to quote requests, manage communications related to booking and artist management services, and comply with legal obligations.
privacy.legalBasisText: Processing is based on the data subject's consent (Art. 6.1.a GDPR), given by accepting the privacy notice in the contact form, and on the performance of pre-contractual measures (Art. 6.1.b GDPR).
privacy.retentionText: Personal data is retained for the time necessary to fulfill the request and in any case no longer than 24 months from collection, unless required by law.
privacy.rightsIntro: At any time you may exercise the rights provided by Articles 15-22 of the GDPR:
privacy.rightsContact: To exercise your rights, write to
privacy.cookiesText: This website uses only strictly necessary technical cookies (theme preference, no profiling or third-party cookies). No consent is required under Art. 122 of the Italian Privacy Code.

terms.title: TERMS &
terms.subtitle: General conditions of use of the website and services offered.
terms.premiseText: These Terms and Conditions govern the use of the {{companyName}} website and the booking and artist management services offered. Use of the website implies full acceptance of these conditions.
terms.serviceBooking: Booking and management of artists and bands
terms.serviceQuotes: Personalized quotes for private and public events
terms.quotesText: Requests submitted through the contact form do not constitute a binding contract. The quote will be prepared based on the information provided and sent to the email address indicated. Acceptance of the quote by the client and confirmation by {{companyName}} shall constitute the finalization of the agreement.
terms.ipText: All website content — text, images, logos, videos, graphics — is the property of {{companyName}} or their respective owners and is protected by copyright law. Any unauthorized reproduction, distribution, or use is prohibited.
terms.liabilityText: {{companyName}} strives to keep website information accurate and up to date, but does not guarantee completeness or absence of errors. Event dates, prices, and artist availability are subject to change and must be confirmed through an official quote.
terms.lawText: These Terms are governed by Italian law. For any dispute, the Court of Alessandria shall have jurisdiction.
terms.contactText: For questions regarding these Terms, write to
